summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 1639

core_modules.description: Core symbolic atom creation and symbol utilities; foundational for nearly all SymPy workflows.
Canonical conversion layer from Python/native inputs into SymPy expressions.
Safe/controlled text-to-expression parsing entrypoint for MCP tool inputs.
Classical equation solving interface for symbolic and numeric roots.
Set-oriented and system-solving APIs with clearer mathematical semantics.
Symbolic integration front door and unevaluated integral representation.
Public facade exporting high-value APIs used by most downstream users.
Linear algebra primitives and matrix expression operations.
Expression rendering to LaTeX for rich MCP responses.

cli_commands.name: isympy
cli_commands.description: Interactive SymPy shell/session bootstrap; useful as a human CLI but not ideal as MCP primary transport.
